name: Automate image validation tasks using AI vision
description: Downloads images from Google Drive, uses Claude AI vision to validate each image against specified criteria (passport photos, product images, document scans), logs validation results to Google Sheets, and reports to Slack with pass/fail status.

source.originalName: Automate image validation tasks using AI Vision

googleDriveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for listing image files

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for validation results

imageUrls.description: Comma-separated list of image URLs to validate

validationType.description: Type: passport_photo, product_image, document_scan, id_card, general

validationCriteria.description: Custom validation criteria (e.g. 'must show a wine bottle label clearly')

steps.name: Build validation criteria based on type
Build Claude AI vision validation prompt
Build spreadsheet rows from validation results
Save validation results to Google Sheets
